ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, US, Italy) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the region (e.g., GB, US, IT) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard and any relevant details */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the conversion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product for which the size conversion is being requested */,
  "from_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region from which size is being converted */,
  "to_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which size is being converted */,
  "requested_size" TEXT /* Requested size in the original region */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the target region */,
  "size_chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart used for the conversion */,
  "conversion_accuracy" TEXT /* Measure of the accuracy of the conversion (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the size fit */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the conversion request was made */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_to_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_from_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
column_names: Name of the region (e.g., UK, US, Italy)
